description: Use this API to specify or return the value of the base frequency option setting. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = base_frequency(rval) ierr, rval = base_frequency()

parameters.name: rval
parameters.description: Base frequency (usually 50 or 60). (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 60.0 by default; else output).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
